title: Mouthwatering Citrusy Canadian Runner Beans Skillet
description: A vibrant and refreshing vegan dish featuring blanched Canadian runner beans, bursting with citrus flavors, perfect for a crowd-pleasing meal.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and blanch the runner beans for 5 minutes.
Shock the blanched beans in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the blanched runner beans, lemon juice, orange zest, salt, and black pepper to the skillet.
Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the beans are tender and lightly browned.
Stir in the halved cherry tomatoes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the skillet hot, garnished with extra orange zest if desired.
